complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down project setup into: repository initialization with branching strategy, directory structure creation for all components (firmware/ROS2/simulation/hardware/docs), CI/CD pipeline setup with automated testing, safety documentation creation (emergency procedures, RF compliance, flight protocols), and Docker development environment configuration for team consistency.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity involving multiple technologies and documentation requirements. Critical foundation task that affects all subsequent work. Requires coordination of various tools and compliance considerations.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: DWM3001CDK Hardware Setup and Initial Testing
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide hardware setup into: firmware flashing for all 5 modules, anchor positioning and mounting system setup, tag module configuration, basic TWR ranging validation, RF compliance testing with equipment, and power system integration with USB-C power banks.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to hardware configuration, RF compliance requirements, and precision positioning needs. Multiple failure points and specialized equipment required for validation.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Zephyr RTOS Firmware Development for TDoA
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break firmware development into: master-slave synchronization protocol implementation, anchor RX listener task with timestamping, tag blink transmission firmware, Zephyr device tree and Kconfig setup, packet structure definition and validation, wireless synchronization with propagation delay correction, and error handling with sequence tracking.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Very high complexity requiring deep embedded systems knowledge, real-time constraints, wireless protocol design, and precise timing requirements. Critical for TDoA accuracy.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide solver implementation into: Chan's method least-squares implementation, Nelder-Mead optimization refinement, 6-state Kalman filter development, anchor geometry validation and GDOP calculation, outlier detection using RANSAC, and ROS 2 node integration with proper error propagation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity involving advanced mathematical algorithms, real-time processing requirements, and integration with ROS 2. Critical for positioning accuracy and requires strong mathematical background.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break ROS 2 integration into: serial/USB interface bridge development, custom message type definition for TDoA data, tf2 transform setup for anchor and tag positions, robot_localization package integration, and diagnostic publishing with lifecycle management.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity focusing on ROS 2 integration patterns and message handling. Requires solid understanding of ROS 2 architecture and real-time data streaming.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Jetson Orin Sensor Integration and EKF Fusion
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide sensor integration into: Jetson Orin Ubuntu/ROS 2 setup, ICM-42688-P IMU driver configuration, Intel RealSense D435i integration with visual odometry, robot_localization EKF configuration and tuning, sensor health monitoring implementation, and optional RPLiDAR integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to multiple sensor integrations, EKF tuning requirements, and real-time processing constraints on embedded hardware. Critical for sensor fusion accuracy.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Holybro Quadrotor Assembly and PX4 Integration
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break quadrotor integration into: mechanical assembly with weight optimization, PX4 firmware setup and parameter configuration, MAVROS bridge setup for ROS 2 communication, safety system configuration (failsafe, geofence, emergency stop), power system setup with monitoring, and custom mounting solution for payloads.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity involving mechanical assembly, flight controller configuration, safety systems, and weight constraints. Critical for safe flight operations and payload integration.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide simulation setup into: Ignition Fortress world creation matching lab environment, custom UWB sensor plugin with realistic noise modeling, accurate drone model development with proper physics, movable obstacle implementation, domain randomization system setup, and gym-gazebo2 RL interface development.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity requiring custom plugin development, physics modeling, and RL interface integration. Critical for training environment fidelity and sim-to-real transfer success.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break ORCA implementation into: core ORCA algorithm implementation for multi-agent collision avoidance, goal-directed navigation using potential fields or RRT*, confidence monitoring system for RL/ORCA switching, dynamic obstacle tracking with Kalman filters, and safety layer with minimum clearance enforcement.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity involving advanced collision avoidance algorithms, path planning, and safety systems. Serves as critical fallback for RL system and requires robust implementation.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: PPO RL Training with Sim-to-Real Transfer
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide RL training into: PPO implementation using Stable-Baselines3, reward function design and tuning, parallel training environment setup, progressive curriculum learning implementation, domain randomization during training, policy evaluation and testing framework, sim-to-real transfer techniques implementation, and real hardware deployment with confidence monitoring.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Very high complexity as the culmination of all previous work. Requires advanced RL knowledge, careful reward engineering, robust training pipeline, and successful sim-to-real transfer. Highest risk and technical challenge.
